reason: Internal chatbot or tooling page should not be shown in the customer-facing asset center
Audio assets should be kept in data but hidden from the customer-facing asset center by default
3D drawing or proposal files require internal review before customer-facing publication
3D HTML demo pages require internal review before customer-facing publication
Poster or marketing image assets should be reviewed before customer-facing display
Teach documents may be internal support material and should be reviewed before customer-facing display
Validation reports are supporting documents and should be reviewed before customer-facing display
